ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(66, 66, 66), rgb(180, 180, 180)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(66, 66, 66), rgb(180, 180, 180));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 240, 240), rgb(31, 31, 31)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 78px; height: 1px; padding-top: 85px; margin-left: 250px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #882255;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#882255, #fca4d0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
